title: Canvas Background & Sharing
summary: Pushing for 85+. Improve the canvas with a textured breadboard background, add share functionality for daily challenge results, and a brief animated intro screen to boost first impression.

tasks.description: Textured breadboard canvas background — replace the plain dot grid with a more realistic breadboard pattern: subtle PCB green/brown trace lines, component area grid, copper trace aesthetic. Use canvas patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Canvas background has a distinct breadboard/PCB feel
Subtle colored trace lines in a grid pattern
Not overwhelming — games elements still clearly visible

tasks.description: Share daily challenge results — after completing a daily challenge, show a 'Share' button that copies a text-based result summary to clipboard (like Wordle style)
acceptance_criteria: Share button appears after completing daily challenge
Text includes: date, gate count, stars, time

tasks.description: Brief animated intro — when the page first loads, show a brief title animation (Signal Circuit text with electric spark effect) before transitioning to level select. Keep it under 2 seconds.
acceptance_criteria: On first load, title animates in with electric/glow effect
Only plays once per page load

rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
